description:
Google Messages for Web on Windows. Runs "Messages for web" in a native Windows application. Close to system tray. Ctrl+Alt+M to show window.

Runs Google Messages for Web inside of a native Windows application.\nKeeps Messages for Web running in the system tray. To show the window, press Ctrl+Alt+M or right-click the icon and click "Show".
- Fixed an issue where improper hotkey registration prevented windows from restoring correctly from the taskbar.
